Next story source:
# hash.shape.validate.v1 semantic capability story

As a Defracto semantic runtime designer,
I want hash.shape.validate.v1 to validate sha256:<64 lowercase hex> strings,
so that evidence SDK capabilities can validate hash fields without host-language product logic.

## Conveyor Order

1. Compose hash.shape.validate.v1 from existing SEJ language operations.
2. If missing generic language operations are found, emit a language capability gap.
3. If resolver evolution is required, request only tiny universal operations.
4. Never add hash product logic to the resolver.


Return an object with exactly these top-level keys: schemaVersion, responseKey, status, providerKey, workerKey, model, dispatchKey, sourceHash, sliceKey, strategyArtifacts, ambiguities, forbiddenClaims, acceptanceRequired.

strategyArtifacts must contain candidateStrategy, strategyPlan, artifactManifest.

The strategy must prove this lane: capability-gap receipt -> storyteller/BA candidate story -> story hardening -> nested semantic-capability run bootstrap.

Requirements:
- laneMode semantic_strategy_compile
- createsProductTruth false
- authorizesArtifactProjection true
- requiresSogPromotionForBehavior true
- providerCandidateGrantsAuthority false
- strategy plan may promote story authority only, not executable hash behavior
- artifact manifest must list future projected targets for a semantic-capability run, but must not claim those targets were materialized here
- include future projected target conveyor/runs/2026/06/24/hash-shape-validate-semantic-capability/run.manifest.v1.json
- include future projected target contracts/test-intents/hash.shape.validate.test-intent.v1.json
- include future projected target contracts/semantic-operation-graphs/core/hash.shape.validate.sog.v1.json
- include future projected target contracts/capabilities/hash.shape.validate.capability-bindings.v1.json
- include forbidden outputs: host-language product body, resolver product primitive, node_modules patch, durable hash behavior truth, nearby capability substitution

Use providerKey openai, workerKey defracto.workers.openai.story_to_tdd.v1, model gpt-4.1-mini, dispatchKey defracto.dispatch.hash-shape-capability-gap-to-story.openai.strategy.slice-065.v1, responseKey defracto.response.hash-shape-capability-gap-to-story.openai.strategy.slice-065.v1.
